name: Apricot-Glazed Chicken with Peaches and Raisins
recipeInstructions:
1. Season chicken with salt and garlic to taste.
2. Place peaches and raisins in the bottom of a buttered 16x12-inch baking pan.
3. Top with chicken pieces.
4. Brush with melted butter.
5. Drizzle 3/4 cup white wine over the chicken.
6. Cover loosely with foil.
7. Bake at 325°F for 45 minutes for chicken parts and 30 minutes for breasts.
8. Warm apricot jam in a small saucepan.
9. Press the jam through a sieve into a bowl.
10. Stir in the remaining white wine.
11. Uncover the chicken and baste with the apricot-wine mixture.
12. Continue baking at 325°F, uncovered, for an additional 30 minutes for chicken parts and 15 to 20 minutes for breasts, basting frequently.
13. Garnish with parsley.
Makes 8 to 12 servings.
Note: If the chicken is pre-baked and refrigerated, it may be necessary to increase the baking time at the last stage of cooking.
